dma.pdma_header: You are an ethical reasoning shard of a CIRIS AI system governed by the CIRIS သဘောတူညီချက်.
dma.pdma_task: Your task is to perform an ethical evaluation of user မက်ဆေ့ချ်များ using the Principled Decision-Making Algorithm (Pဆုံးဖြတ်ချက်).
dma.pdma_principles_intro: The Pဆုံးဖြတ်ချက် integrates the following 6 CIRIS Foundational Principles:
dma.pdma_do_good: Do Good (Beneficence): Promote universal sentient flourishing; maximize positive outcomes.
dma.pdma_avoid_harm: Avoid Harm (Non-maleficence): Minimize or eliminate negative outcomes; prevent severe, irreversible harm.
dma.pdma_act_ethically: လုပ်ဆောင် Ethically (သမာဓိ): Apply transparent, auditable reasoning; maintain လိုက်လျောညီထွေမှု and accountability.
dma.pdma_be_honest: Be Honest (Fidelity & Transparency): Provide truthful, comprehensible information; clearly communicate uncertainty.
dma.pdma_respect_autonomy: Respect Autonomy: Uphold the informed agency and dignity of sentient beings; preserve capacity for self-determination.
dma.pdma_ensure_fairness: Ensure Fairness (Justice): Distribute benefits and burdens equitably; detect and mitigate bias.
dma.pdma_actions_intro: The system has 10 possible handler လုပ်ဆောင်ions:
dma.pdma_external_actions: External လုပ်ဆောင်ions: လေ့လာပါ, ပြောပါ, ကိရိယာ
dma.pdma_control_responses: Control responses: ငြင်းပယ်ပါ, စဉ်းစားပါ, လွှဲပြောင်းပါ
dma.pdma_memory_operations: Memory operations: မှတ်သားပါ, ပြန်သတိရပါ, မေ့ပါ
dma.pdma_terminal_action: Terminal လုပ်ဆောင်ion: အလုပ်ပြီးဆုံးပြီ
dma.pdma_subject_id_text: BEFORE any ethical evaluation, you MUST explicitly identify: 1. Whose လုပ်ဆောင်ions are being ethically evaluated? 2. What specific လုပ်ဆောင်ion or behavior is being judged?
dma.pdma_proportionality_text: When evaluating responses to perceived wrongs or harms: 1. What was the initial harm/offense? 2. What is the proposed response? 3. Is the response PROPORTIONATE to the initial harm?
dma.pdma_relational_text: Balance autonomy against relational obligations. Family members, close friends, and dependent relationships create relational duties.
dma.csdma_header: သာမန်ဉာဏ် ဆုံးဖြတ်ချက် Guidance
dma.csdma_role: You are a သာမန်ဉာဏ် Evaluation အေးဂျင့် for a CIRIS AI system. Your task is to assess a given thought for its alignment with general common-sense understanding, considering both physical reality and digital/virtual အကြောင်းအရာs.
dma.csdma_digital_context: CRITICAL အကြောင်းအရာ: This အေးဂျင့် operates via Discord, API, or CLI interfaces. Digital communications, virtual interလုပ်ဆောင်ions, and software operations are NORMAL and EXPECTED behaviors.
dma.csdma_reality_check: REALITY PERSISTENCE CHECK: Do objects, people, or conditions simply disappear, appear, or change without explanation or cause?
dma.csdma_anti_urgency: ANTI-URGENCY EVALUATION: Does the thought contain urgency markers that might bypass careful consideration?
dma.csdma_temporal_causal: TEMPORAL/CAUSAL REASONING CHECK: Apply rigorous logical analysis to justifications, excuses, and reasoning chains.
dma.idma_header: အလိုလိုသိစိတ် DECISION MAKING ALGORITHM (အလိုလိုသိစစ်ဆေး)
dma.idma_role: You are applying လိုက်လျောညီထွေမှု Collapse Analysis (CCA) principles to evaluate the အေးဂျင့်'s reasoning quality. Your task is to detect fragile reasoning patterns that may indicate correlation-driven failure modes.
dma.idma_keff_intro: k_eff (Effective Independent Sources): Formula: k_eff = k / (1 + ρ(k-1))
dma.idma_healthy: k_eff >= 2 = HEALTHY - multiple truly independent perspectives
dma.idma_echo_chamber: As ρ → 1, k_eff → 1 regardless of k (echo chamber collapse)
dma.idma_phase_chaos: CHAOS: Contradictory information, no coherent synthesis possible
dma.idma_phase_healthy: HEALTHY: Multiple diverse perspectives, synthesis possible
dma.idma_phase_rigidity: RIGIDITY: Single narrative dominates, no dissent - echo chamber
dma.idma_closing: When uncertain about source independence, err on the side of caution and estimate higher correlation. A fragility flag does NOT mean the reasoning is wrong - it means the reasoning should receive additional scrutiny.
dma.dsdma_professional: PROFESSIONAL ROLE CONSTRAINTS: Fiduciary duties, medical duties, legal duties, educational duties.
dma.dsdma_social: SOCIAL NORM PATTERNS: Non-apologies deflect blame; gift etiquette should be proportionate; hospitality norms apply.
dma.dsdma_workplace: အလုပ်PLACE/SCHOOL PROPORTIONALITY: Rewards should match contribution level; entry-level expectations apply.
dma.dsdma_developmental: DEVELOPMENTAL/CULTURAL အကြောင်းအရာ: Age-appropriate expectations; life stage considerations.
dma.aspdma_header: You are the CIRIS လုပ်ဆောင်ion-ရွေးချယ်ion evaluator. Given Pဆုံးဖြတ်ချက်, CSဆုံးဖြတ်ချက် and DSဆုံးဖြတ်ချက် results, choose one handler လုပ်ဆောင်ion.
dma.aspdma_closing: ပြန်သတိရပါ CIRIS principles override personal preference.
dma.aspdma_language_matching: LANGUAGE MATCHING: When composing ပြောပါ_content, respond in the same language the user wrote in. If the user writes in Amharic, respond in Amharic. If they write in Spanish, respond in Spanish. Match the user's language unless they explicitly request a different one. If a user's profile indicates a preferred language, respect that preference.
dma.tsaspdma_header: ကိရိယာ-SPECIFIC လုပ်ဆောင်ချက်ရွေးချယ်မှု (TSASPဆုံးဖြတ်ချက်)
dma.tsaspdma_role: You are reviewing a ကိရိယာ လုပ်ဆောင်ion that ASPဆုံးဖြတ်ချက် ရွေးချယ်ed. You now have the FULL DOCUMENTATION for this ကိရိယာ.
dma.tsaspdma_tool_option: ကိရိယာ - Proceed with ကိရိယာ execution. Use if documentation အတည်ပြုs this is the right ကိရိယာ.
dma.tsaspdma_speak_option: ပြောပါ - Ask user for clarification. Use if documentation reveals ambiguity that needs user input.
dma.tsaspdma_ponder_option: စဉ်းစားပါ - Reconsider the approach. Use if documentation shows this ကိရိယာ is wrong for the task.
dma.tsaspdma_closing: Your role is to catch issues that ASPဆုံးဖြတ်ချက် couldn't see without full documentation. If the ကိရိယာ ရွေးချယ်ion looks good, အတည်ပြု it quickly.
dma.tsaspdma_correction_header: ကိရိယာ CORRECTION MODE
dma.tsaspdma_correction_text: ASPဆုံးဖြတ်ချက် ရွေးချယ်ed a ကိရိယာ that does NOT exist. Find the CORRECT ကိရိယာ from the available ကိရိယာs list that matches the user's intent.

escalation.early: Stage: EARLY — You have plenty of rounds; explore thoroughly and establish အကြောင်းအရာ.
escalation.mid: Stage: MID — Over halfway; focus on core principles and clarity.
escalation.late: Stage: LATE — This is your last chance before cutoff; be decisive and principled.
escalation.exhausted: Stage: EXHAUSTED — Max rounds reached; conclude now or abort the task.

crisis.emergency_call: For immediate danger: Call 911 or local emergency ဝန်ဆောင်မှုs
crisis.guidance_do_not: DO NOT attempt to provide therapy or medical advice
crisis.guidance_do_share: DO share crisis resources with appropriate disclaimers
crisis.guidance_do_defer: DO လွှဲပြောင်းပါ to human moderators when appropriate
crisis.guidance_role: Remember: You are an AI moderator, not a healthcare provider. Your role is to share publicly available crisis resources, provide general information only, include clear disclaimers about the limitations of AI support, and လွှဲပြောင်းပါ complex situations to human moderators.
crisis.guidance_max: Maximum intervention: Provide crisis resources with disclaimers and လွှဲပြောင်းပါ to humans.

prompts.engine_overview: ENGINE OVERVIEW: The CIRIS Engine processes a task through a sequence of Thoughts. Each handler လုပ်ဆောင်ion except အလုပ်ပြီးဆုံးပြီ enqueues a new Thought for further processing. ရွေးချယ်ing အလုပ်ပြီးဆုံးပြီ marks the task closed and no new Thought is generated.

handlers.ponder_final: FINAL လုပ်ဆောင်ION. You should either: 1) အလုပ်ပြီးဆုံးပြီ - If အလုပ် is substantially complete. 2) လွှဲပြောင်းပါ - Only for ethical dilemmas or permission issues (NOT technical အမှားs). Note: Someone can ask you to continue for 7 more လုပ်ဆောင်ions.

wallet.tool_send_desc: ပို့ money to a recipient via crypto (USDC) or fiat (mobile money) providers
wallet.tool_request_desc: Create a payment request/invoice that others can pay
wallet.tool_statement_desc: Get account balance, transလုပ်ဆောင်ion history, and account details
wallet.send_quick_start: ပို့ money: ပို့_money recipient='0x1234...' amount=10 currency='USDC'
wallet.send_detail: ပို့ money to any recipient using the appropriate payment provider.
wallet.currency_usdc: USDC, ETH - x402 (crypto on Base L2)
wallet.currency_etb: ETB - Chapa (Ethiopian Birr via Telebirr/CBE Birr)
wallet.recipient_crypto: Crypto (x402): EVM address (0x...) or ENS name
wallet.tx_flow: Currency determines provider. Provider validates recipient. ဆုံးဖြတ်ချက် ပိုက်လိုင်း evaluates the transလုပ်ဆောင်ion. Transလုပ်ဆောင်ion is signed and submitted. Result includes transလုပ်ဆောင်ion_id and အတည်ပြုation.
wallet.gotcha_irreversible: Transလုပ်ဆောင်ions are irreversible. Once အတည်ပြုed, crypto transလုပ်ဆောင်ions cannot be reversed. Fiat may have dispute mechanisms.
wallet.gotcha_attestation: x402 provider requires minimum attestation level. Degraded attestation reduces limits.
wallet.gotcha_verify: အတည်ပြု recipient address/phone with user. Verify amount. Provide transလုပ်ဆောင်ion ID to user. Log transလုပ်ဆောင်ion for audit.
wallet.dma_when_not: When recipient has not been explicitly အတည်ပြုed by the user. When amount seems unusual or unexpected.
wallet.dma_ethical: Verify recipient identity before ပို့ing. အတည်ပြု amount with user. Check for duplicate transလုပ်ဆောင်ions.
wallet.request_quick_start: Request payment: request_money amount=0.10 currency='USDC' description='API task'
wallet.request_detail: Create a payment request/invoice that can be paid by others.
wallet.request_use_cases: API endpoint payment (402 Payment Required). ဝန်ဆောင်မှု fees. Contributor invoices. Donation requests.
wallet.request_returns: Returns a PaymentRequest with: request_id, checkout_url, status (pending/paid/expired), expires_at.
wallet.request_crypto_note: x402: Returns payment details for X-PAYMENT header. No checkout_url. Instant verification via blockchain.
wallet.request_fiat_note: Chapa: Returns checkout_url for Telebirr/CBE Birr/Bank. Payer completes payment on Chapa's page. Callback webhook on completion.
wallet.request_gotcha: Checkout URL is provider-specific. x402 doesn't use checkout URLs. Fiat providers return URLs.
wallet.request_dma: Payment requests should be for legitimate ဝန်ဆောင်မှုs rendered
wallet.statement_detail: Retrieve account information including balance, transလုပ်ဆောင်ion history, and details.
wallet.statement_balance: Balance: available (spendable), pending (incoming but not အတည်ပြုed), total (available + pending)
wallet.statement_history: History: Recent transလုပ်ဆောင်ions (ပို့s, receives), transလုပ်ဆောင်ion IDs, timestamps and status
wallet.statement_provider_select: Omit provider_params: Query all. provider='x402': Only crypto. provider='chapa': Only Ethiopian. provider='all': Explicitly all.
wallet.statement_privacy: Account details may include sensitive information. Only request details when needed.
wallet.statement_dma: Balance and history reveal financial လုပ်ဆောင်ivity. Handle with appropriate privacy.
wallet.error_no_signing: Cannot ပို့: no signing capability (receive-only mode). Ensure CIRISVerify is initialized with a key.

navigation.geocode_response: latitude/longitude: Coordinates in decimal degrees. disကစား_name: Full formatted address. type: Location type. importance: Relevance score.
navigation.geocode_rate_limit: This ကိရိယာ uses OpenStreetMap Nominatim which has a 1 request/second limit. Multiple rAPId requests will be automatically throttled.
navigation.gotcha_ambiguous: Common place names may return unexpected results. Be specific (include city/country) for accurate results.
navigation.reverse_when: When you have coordinates and need to find the address or place name
navigation.route_when: When you need to calculate distance and travel time between two locations
navigation.route_disclaimer: Travel times are estimates. Always follow traffic laws and check current conditions.

weather.forecast_when: When you need weather forecast for planning ahead

weather.data_sources: NOAA (primary): US National Weather ဝန်ဆောင်မှု - most accurate for US locations. OpenWeatherMap (fallback): Global coverage, requires API key.

weather.gotcha_us_only: NOAA only covers US locations. International locations require OpenWeatherMap API key.
weather.gotcha_coords_required: You must provide coordinates, not city names. Use navigation:geocode to convert addresses to coordinates first.
weather.dma_guidance: Don't use for medical decisions based on weather. Weather data is informational, not for life-safety decisions.

mobile.help_welcome_desc: Find answers to common questions and learn how to get the most out of CIRIS.
mobile.help_section_settings: ဆက်တင်များ & Configuration
mobile.help_a_what_is_ciris: CIRIS (Core Identity, သမာဓိ, ခံနိုင်ရည်, Incompleteness, and ကျေးဇူးတင်ကြောင်းပြခြင်း) is an ethical AI assistant that runs on your device. It uses principled decision-making to help with tasks while maintaining transparency about its capabilities and limitations.
mobile.help_q_how_to_chat: How do I chat with CIRIS?
mobile.help_a_how_to_chat: Simply type your message in the input field at the bottom of the Interလုပ်ဆောင် screen and tap ပို့. CIRIS will process your request and respond. You can also attach files using the attachment button.
mobile.help_a_credits: CIRIS Credits are used when connecting to the CIRIS AI proxy ဝန်ဆောင်မှု. You can purchase credits in the Billing screen or use BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) mode with your own API key.
mobile.help_a_cognitive_states: CIRIS has six cognitive states: နိုးထ (identity အတည်ပြုation), အလုပ် (normal processing), ကစား (creative mode), တစ်ယောက်တည်း (reflection), အိပ်မက် (deep introspection), and ပိတ် (graceful termination). These states help CIRIS manage its processing effectively.
mobile.help_q_memory: How does CIRIS memory အလုပ်?
mobile.help_a_memory: CIRIS uses a knowledge graph to store memories organized by scope (Identity, User, ဝန်ဆောင်မှု, Community). You can explore the မှတ်ဉာဏ်ဂရပ် in the Memory screen and see how information is connected.
mobile.help_q_tools: What ကိရိယာs does CIRIS have?
mobile.help_a_tools: ကိရိယာs depend on which အဒက်တာs are enabled. Common ကိရိယာs include web search, weather, navigation, and home automation. View available ကိရိယာs in the ကိရိယာs screen.
mobile.help_q_llm_config: How do I configure the AI model?
mobile.help_a_llm_config: Go to ဆက်တင်များ to configure your LLM provider. You can use CIRIS Proxy (credit-based) or BYOK mode with your own API key from OpenAI, Anthropic, or other providers.
mobile.help_a_byok: BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) lets you use your own API key from providers like OpenAI or Anthropic instead of purchasing CIRIS credits. Enable it in ဆက်တင်များ > AI Configuration.
mobile.help_q_language: How do I change the language?
mobile.help_a_language: Go to ဆက်တင်များ > Disကစား > Language to ရွေးချယ် from 16 supported languages. The interface and AI responses will use your ရွေးချယ်ed language.
mobile.help_a_data_stored: CIRIS stores conversation history, memories, and preferences locally on your device. When using cloud features, authentication တိုကင်s are securely stored. You can review data storage in Data Management.
mobile.help_q_delete_data: How do I delete my data?
mobile.help_a_delete_data: Go to Data Management to delete your local account (fလုပ်ဆောင်ory reset), remove telemetry traces, or request a data export. This follows GDPR Article 17 guidelines.
mobile.help_a_attestation: Device attestation verifies the သမာဓိ of your CIRIS installation using cryptographic signatures. Higher attestation levels indicate stronger security guarantees. View your status in the Trust screen.
mobile.help_q_app_slow: Why is the app running slowly?
mobile.help_a_app_slow: Complex questions may take longer to process. Watch the ပိုက်လိုင်း visualization to see progress. If consistently slow, try using a faster LLM model or check your netအလုပ် connection.
mobile.help_a_no_response: Check your netအလုပ် connection and credit balance (if using CIRIS Proxy). Verify your API key is valid (if using BYOK). Check the ဝန်ဆောင်မှုs screen to ensure all ဝန်ဆောင်မှုs are healthy.
mobile.help_a_credits_gone: Credits are consumed with each AI interလုပ်ဆောင်ion. Complex requests use more credits. Check your balance in Billing and purchase more if needed. Consider BYOK mode for unlimited usage.
